summary:
PROPHETIC VISIONS OF THE ANTICHRIST AND GEOPOLITICS: Brandon describes an AI-generated image reflecting his vision of the Antichrist at the Last Supper, manipulated by Satan. He details a prophetic scenario involving a peace accord with Israel, a three-and-a-half-year timeline, and a green cloak with Arabic writing covering Europe. In his visions, Brandon sees Iraq emerging with immense oil wealth comparable to Saudi Arabia. Conversely, he envisions a black horse bringing severe drought and famine across Europe, Africa, and Ukraine, alongside major financial corruption involving hidden Swiss accounts. He also asserts that Pope Leo will be seen bowing before the Antichrist.

BLESSINGS ON ISRAEL AND NATURAL DISASTERS: Brandon claims that Israel will experience unprecedented agricultural abundance, including giant fruits, massive fish harvests, and blessings upon supportive nations. He predicts a leadership change in Israel, with a new orthodox figure resembling King David replacing Benjamin Netanyahu. Additionally, Brandon warns of a devastating earthquake that will split the Mount of Olives, noting the timing will coincide precisely with the ripening of olive trees. He also mentions seismic activity along the New Madrid fault line, volcanic eruptions in Guatemala, and strange groaning sounds from the ocean as signs of the times.

CYBERSECURITY THREATS AND TECHNOLOGICAL WARNINGS: Brandon shares a vision of massive cyberattacks orchestrated by China against major American financial institutions, specifically naming Bank of America and Charles Schwab. He claims these breaches will cause significant embarrassment, forcing banks to seek out new cryptocurrency-based cybersecurity solutions. Furthermore, Brandon links recent real-world events, such as a historic US-Iraq business deal and Starlink's expansion into Iraq, to his prophetic timeline. He suggests that Elon Musk's Starlink technology will eventually be utilized by the Antichrist to establish a global digital control system.

AMERICAN POLITICS AND DIGITAL LEGISLATION: Brandon reflects on the safety of Donald Trump, noting his recent appearance at a soccer game in New Jersey amidst poor air quality from Canadian wildfires. He recalls a past vision involving a pregnant woman in the Oval Office and J.D. Vance assuming power. Brandon also issues strong warnings about the Clarity Act, predicting that its passage will rapidly accelerate the implementation of a global digital currency and a socialist beast system of financial control, manipulated by major banking institutions like J.P. Morgan.

SPIRITUAL REVIVAL AND YOUTH MOVEMENT: Brandon prophesies an imminent and unprecedented spiritual revival targeting the younger generation. He foresees massive awakenings sweeping across major university campuses, including Miami, Auburn, Tennessee, and UCLA, as well as global movements across Europe, Africa, and Asia. He emphasizes that this new wave will discard traditional church methods, bringing forth a new generation of passionate youth pastors and a return to miraculous healings reminiscent of historical revivalists, predicting that sickness and spiritual ego will be entirely eradicated from the church.

PERSONAL PROSPERITY AND DIVINE ABUNDANCE: Brandon encourages his audience to abandon poverty mindsets and believe in profound financial miracles. Drawing from his own background of transitioning from a minimum-wage janitor to successfully selling items on platforms like eBay or Poshmark, despite spelling challenges, he emphasizes that divine guidance can lead to unexpected wealth. He urges believers to sow large seeds of faith, expect extraordinary returns, and trust that significant wealth transfers and creative business ideas are available to those who actively seek them.
rawData: [July 20, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=usjH1gnxOZw]-[All right. Well, good evening, family. Thank you for joining me again tonight, all 1,700 of you so far. Let's go ahead and talk about what the Lord showed us last night when we were praying. What a time of prayer we had last night, praying for President Trump and the nations. The Lord allowed us to see into the tribulation with the peace agreement. I saw the Last Supper and the picture of the Last Supper. Do you have that picture, son, that you made with AI? Look at that; this is kind of cool. I had Braden make this with AI, and that's the way it looked in the vision. Braden created it with the Last Supper, with the Antichrist in the middle, but he had a golden crown above his brow and Satan was speaking in his ear. And whenever he was speaking to him, he had a fat tongue and he had a black mask like Zorro around his eyes. When Satan was talking into the ear of the Antichrist, spit was coming on him. I don't know if Satan has spit, but it was in the vision. I thought it was interesting because I'm thinking, 'Do you think the devil has spit?' I don't know; I don't think he would. But it doesn't matter to me; whenever you see things, it's symbolic for something when the Lord is showing you things. As the Antichrist was there, they were signing the peace accord with Israel. I saw 'three and a half years' above his head. I saw the devil talking in the Antichrist's ear, and I saw them signing the papers, a covenant with many. As I was seeing that, I saw Berlin and a storm in Berlin. I saw Iraq. As I was looking into Europe, I saw a green cloak go over Europe with white Arabic writing across it. It covered it, and I thought that was interesting. Then I heard about Iraq and great oil deals. I saw Iraq join up, and they were equal to Saudi Arabia in oil wealth. I saw oil coming up out of the ground in Iraq. They were stinking rich with oil. I saw pipelines, major deals coming forth, and buildings being built. I saw cars and wealth come out of Iraq along with Saudi Arabia. I saw the Prince, MBS, come out of this, and he was influencing Iraq and other Arab nations. Then I saw a black horse riding with a black rider that looked like the Grim Reaper, but it had gauze coming off it. As it was riding upon the lands, I saw drought and famine. He had scales in his hand, like the old scales used to weigh money or gold, and he was riding across the land in Europe. As I was looking at Ukraine and the wheat crop, I saw the wheat crop was in trouble; there was something wrong with Ukraine. I saw corruption with Swiss accounts in Ukraine—major money. I saw twenty-four billion dollars; there were secret accounts of money fraud coming out of Ukraine. The black horse started going through Africa, and I saw a great drought—it was beyond drought. But the oil in Iraq, Saudi Arabia, and other parts of the Arab nations was plentiful. However, the wheat was bad and dry; there was a great drought upon the earth. Suddenly, I saw a blessing on Israel. The Lord said he was breathing on the Abrahamic Covenant so that the world would see it. I saw fruit the size of softballs, tomatoes, and vegetables—all kinds of plentiful agriculture. I saw bountiful harvests of fish coming up out of the sea. I saw fish, wine, and bread, and they were blessed. The wine was in a beautiful bottle and looked like red grape juice. I saw beautiful fish that were blue on the top and faded down into a scaly white. I saw beautiful bread with oats on top, and I saw a blessing. Those who blessed them were blessed, and I saw it trickle down on the nations that blessed them, and those that cursed them were cursed. I saw a vast drought on the nations; Egypt, Syria, and Turkey were greatly in drought. I saw nations like America; it trickled down on the people who were for them. I saw a new leader; Bibi's days were numbered. I saw a new leader coming up out of Israel who had a heart like David. He was wearing a hat—a little circle on his head. He looked traditional, like an Orthodox Jew. He had a nice button-up shirt and looked kind of bald, but he rose up and wasn't old-looking like Bibi with gray hair. This new face rose up like a David. I saw great blessing. Yeah, what is that? A kippah? I don't know. To those familiar with this, I'm not trying to be insulting; I'm just ignorant. I saw great blessing coming out of Israel. I saw the fruit. Then I saw a vast splitting of the Mount of Olives again. I saw a shaking of the Mount of Olives, and as it split, I saw the Temple Mount completely decimated where the Dome of the Rock is. It was uninhabitable. But the Lord said specifically, 'Look at the trees, for you'll know the time of this.' I saw olives on the olive tree that were full and ripe for picking. I told my son to look up when the olive harvest is in Israel, for this is the timeframe of when the earthquake will take place over the Mount of Olives. I saw it split in a bad earthquake. But the Lord said, 'Look at the olive tree.' The olives were ripe. It wasn't a fig tree this time; it was an olive tree with olives all over it. The Lord said, 'This will tell you the timeframe of when I will split this mountain.' I don't know if it's this year or if it's in the tribulation, but I saw a shaking of that mountain, and the Lord said it will happen in this timeframe. Braden said, 'Daddy, this happens in September or October.' That would be Rosh Hashanah—that timeframe—and Yom Kippur. Is it this year? I don't believe so. Like I said, I don't want to add to or take away from anything. I don't have a date; I just know I'm looking for this earthquake to happen when the olives are ripe. It wasn't figs. The Lord always tells me, 'Look at the fig tree, Brandon.' I saw those figs, and they were vast and big. But there was something about the Mount of Olives. Maybe it has some olives on it; I don't know, I've never been to Israel. I don't want to add to or take from, but I'm just telling you: I saw olive trees, and they had olives, and they looked like black olives. They looked like fruit. I saw that, and then I saw a shaking on the New Madrid. I saw the drought. I saw the black rider on the black horse riding upon the land, and I saw wherever he went, there was drought. I saw famine, and money was in trouble. I saw famine of agriculture. Very interesting. I saw agreements being made for Iraq again—great agreements, financial blessing coming to Iraq—but they would rise out of seemingly nothing. So, we go to the news. Was that everything? I'll cover everything good. Yeah. You saw Europe and Ukraine, and then you saw cyberattacks. Oh, I saw cyberattacks—great cyberattacks on America, on banks, Bank of America. I saw banks that were in trouble—embarrassing moments. I saw cyber breaches for Schwab. I saw embarrassing moments for investment groups. That's what I'll say. And as I saw this, I saw cyberattacks, and it was from China. China was infiltrating, trying to find Social Security numbers and bank information at Charles Schwab. I saw Bank of America, and I saw that they would try to go to a certain crypto for what they do to have cybersecurity. It was cybersecurity for banks. But I saw a banking thing where they were asking for knowledge on how to stop hackers from breaking into their database. And so, very interesting because I heard embarrassing moments for certain big banks, and people were upset about it because China was able to hack. I saw China hacking these banks as an embarrassment. I saw to pray for the UN concerning the United Assembly—the assembly with all the nations coming in September. Praying for the September timeframe over this. Now, I know this is the end of September. Rosh Hashanah is on the 11th—9/11. So, we're praying over this timeframe. Again, always September, praying over this for a major attack coming against Israel in the middle of the night, worse than October 7th. We will continue to pray for this, but yeah, I think that's pretty much everything. Praying over Italy, I saw shakings in Italy. I saw the Pope rise up on the steps of the Antichrist and bowed down to him with one knee. And I saw the Antichrist blessing him as Pope Leo walked up the steps on a red carpet, and Pope Leo put his knee down and bowed before the Antichrist. Now, I thought that was interesting. Now, that will probably tick a lot of people off, but I tell you what I see. I don't add to or take away from anything, and I'm not political. I try to tell you exactly what I saw in the vision God gave me last night. I saw Pope Leo go down there and he went on one knee. So what does that mean? Is that symbolic? Does he really do that? I pray he doesn't, but if he does, he does. I told you what the Lord is saying. So, was that everything? I just want to make sure because I don't want to rush through it. It was very powerful what the Lord showed us last night. I saw—I won't call it the Marriage Supper; it was the Last Supper. They tried to mock it in the vision with the Antichrist. So, you see the picture of it. Braden made it. It's very creepy. So, this is where we are with Iraq today. Now, this is interesting to me: Starlink made a huge deal with Iraq today. Yesterday, they made a massive deal. Iraq made a deal for them to be a major internet provider. So, Iraq will use Starlink for their internet all throughout the country to help give their citizens internet with this new kind of stuff. Iraq grants Starlink license as Washington summit yields $60 billion in US deals. What did I tell you Starlink would be used for? I said Starlink will rise up in the Middle East. And I saw a water machine coming that would be pulling water out of the atmosphere for pure water that has internet provided for everybody. And I saw Elon Musk coming up with some kind of water for people who need water, copying what's already out there but a better design. Well, Starlink, I said, will be used for the chip. And I said the chip communicates to Starlink in the drones in the days ahead, and the Antichrist harnesses Starlink. Isn't it amazing that Iraq is going along with Starlink? And I'm not criticizing Elon Musk; he probably doesn't even know what he's doing. He's just a puppet for the end times right now. And so we see it happening. We know that the Lord said last night, 'Look up, for your redemption draws nigh.' People don't realize the urgency of the hour. We go and we play church and we do church, but most people have no clue how close we are to the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ. There's no urgency, and we must be urgent. Most of the Body of Christ—there's a group of us that are—but it's like tonight we had church and it was beautiful to have the presence of God. You can feel the presence of God. It was wonderful to get refreshed. And I'm going to tell you, it's not playing church; that's Holy Ghost church. That's revival. You can feel it stirring up a wind of His presence, a wind in the fragrance of the Lord. You can feel it. And that's what I'm talking about—not going to a dead church. Go to a church that's alive and that's anticipating the glory of God. And when Mark Jenkins came in, that was amazing. I thank God for Pastor Chip and Ken allowing him to come. And Billy Burke tonight, you see what he did in those services up in Pennsylvania. But it's just having an anticipation of manifestations of the glory and saying, 'God, I want to see your presence manifested in an atmosphere in a church,' and coming expecting Him to do it. So, Starlink made a big agreement with Iraq yesterday. So, it's all part of the plan. It's not coincidence; it's all part of the plan. $60 billion. Do you understand? It's all happening. They come up out of nowhere. Iraq was like a has-been, right? And then they get the new Prime Minister and he's over it. He comes in in May and all of a sudden, if you go back to every word that the Lord gave us about Iraq and told us what was coming clear back over a year ago, you can look at all of them. I said you can see this man coming up; he has a five o'clock shadow. Every one of these words that came to pass—the man has a five o'clock shadow with a mustache. And we gave word after word that's accurate, not flaky. And the Lord said there's corruption in the Central Bank, and you're about to see the corruption be dealt with because Iran's hand is in Iraq. They will pull their hand back as the principality that was over it, the Prince of Persia, had his hands over Iraq, and he will be wounded for a season, sitting on a perch on the mountain that has that bomb in it. So Starlink begins assigning local Iraq IP addresses to users in Iraq just like the Lord said they would. Look, isn't that amazing? Jesus is coming. You can't just have your head in the sand. You got to see it: the signs of the times of the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ. This is how the chip's going to work. I get excited about it. Iraq signs 48 deals with US companies during the PM's visit to Washington—48 deals for oil and all kinds of different stuff to build Iraq out of it. Just like the Lord said, they will come up out of seemingly nothing, and they will be like Saudi Arabia in the days ahead. And you see him shaking hands; he's excited. The five o'clock shadow, just like the Lord warned us. Isn't Jesus wonderful that he would tell us this ahead of time? And it happened; it happened just like he said. Isn't Jesus wonderful? But haters are going to hate, right? Seven Iraq banks under US restrictions cleared for the return to international banking. So the IMF, the International Monetary Fund, cleared seven Iraq banks. Are you serious? Seven Iraq banks under US restrictions cleared for the return. Do you understand? Well, you probably don't. Some of you may, but this is about banking. They had so much corruption. Now they're saying, 'We're going to lift it off of you. Come here. Everything's good now.' So the IMF's going, 'Hey, we're cool.' The World Bank—I mean, the World Bank. International banking. Look at all this stuff. Central Bank of Iraq, the CBI. Look what God's doing. All right, let's see next. But the 48 deals is a pretty big deal. US-Iraq relations enter a new chapter as business leaders finalize over 60 billion in deals. The US Chamber hosted a historic US-Iraq business summit with Iraq Prime Minister Al-Sudani, making over 60 billion in deals. It's just more of the same thing people are talking about. All right, so we see all that. Is there anything else? We have a volcano go off in Guatemala. Boom. You're saying it was after the earthquake? This is what the Lord warned us about. They'll go off in the ocean, and we heard deep calls unto deep. I heard a groaning coming out of the water to the point where when you stand on the beach in the days ahead, you're going to see these things. I heard a groaning coming out of the deep of the ocean. Signs. People are going to get freaked out over this sound. Do you remember hearing all the trumpet sounds? And they go, 'It's HAARP. It's this. It's that.' And you hear the noises and people film it and you go, 'You don't know if you're being hoaxed or if it's real because there are so many copycats.' But there were some authentic first-rounders that were real; I believe those were signs. What was that? It sounds like trumpets. It sounds like something. Signs in the heavens, signs in the earth. It's just getting you prepared. All right. Is that it? Well, so that's kind of a highlight for you. I know it's later, but how long was that? 30 minutes. That's right. Who wants to go tubing with us? We're going to go pray. Do you want to pray with us for a little bit? How many are here? 5,700 of you. Let's pray. What does he say? Oh, so they had their baby. Well, congratulations. President Trump's still alive. Isn't that wonderful? I saw the vision with President Trump gone while she was still pregnant. And I said, 'I see she's in the Oval Office.' And during the time of his attack that I saw him being taken out, I saw that she was pregnant and that J.D. Vance took over the White House during her pregnancy. She wasn't pregnant when I saw this. Well, they hadn't made it public. I don't know if she was pregnant or not. I can't say that. But she was big and pregnant, over eight months, because I could see her belly button was poking through her clothes. So I knew it was symbolic, and the Lord said pray they're going to try to take out the president. And she was pregnant. It didn't happen. The baby's here. We did our job. She wasn't pregnant then that I know of when we heard about it. Well, she would have had to been, wouldn't she? Because we heard about it in January, wasn't it? Or was it in November? Yeah, no, it was November. So she was barely pregnant if she was. How? Because it's nine months. She was not very far along. All right. So let's pray and thank God that President Trump is still alive and he's safe and he's here. He went to the soccer game today and everybody booed him. People are rude, you know? He's in New Jersey. What'd you expect? You should have the game in Oklahoma. People cheer you. Have the game in Texas next time. Don't have it in New York. They're going to boo because they're crazy. But let's go ahead. Let's look at that. Can we show them with Carney? Because Carney went and so did Claudia. Claudia came, and I thought that was interesting. She came from Mexico. Carney came, and all of them came to the game today and nothing. Smoke filled the whole thing. But look at all of them. First lady's there. I haven't seen her in a while. She's stylish. I like her white pants. I wonder what kind of shoes those are. Look at all the people there. I wouldn't be in the same room with Carney. He has him on. Sit way down on the other end. Claudia sits next to my wife. Get out of here. Even the way he's—well, he's talking to Claudia. Oh, did he walk on the field? Yeah, he did. Wow, he's bold. But he went to see the winners. Thank you, Father, for protecting him. That shows no fear. Amazing with all those people walking down there. That's complete trust in your security team and in the Lord. But I'm just saying that is huge. Is there anything else? The smoke in the stadium was terrible for the players breathing that all in. All the fires from Canada, you know? And you can see the smoke looks like fog. Look at him holding his face. That's terrible. Are they sucking the smoke out, son? I don't know. I don't know if this is like a later game or the game before because I don't think they had that back then. But it wasn't that bad, so they must have. That's pretty amazing. Unless that's fake AI. It looks like a fog machine. On July 18th, but it had cleared to moderate air quality on July 19th. Well, praise the Lord. So that was yesterday. That's bad smoke. All right. Let's pray. I have to show you this book. We're going to pray in the Holy Ghost. Most people do not know about the baptism of the Holy Ghost because you're not taught in your church. We're not going to teach it, but I'll tell you where to find out more. You can get the book 'Why Tongues' by Kenneth E. Hagin and read this book. Mark Hankins told me tonight, he said, 'Brandon, I got baptized in the Holy Ghost reading that book as a young man.' That's amazing. So Mark Hankins, who is a preacher, walks in the glory, and it's really cool. But he told me, 'I got baptized in the Holy Ghost reading Why Tongues.' And I thought that is such a cool testimony. So if Mark Hankins got baptized in the Holy Ghost reading that book, you read that book. It's amazing because so many people don't know about speaking in tongues. And you can learn more about it. It's Kenneth E. Hagin and you can find it online everywhere. You just Google it and you can find it even on YouTube. Put it in there: "Why Tongues" by Kenneth E. Hagin and you'll find it. There's a lady, I think there are people in his ministry and stuff; you can find it. So, alright. Father, we just thank you for this time of prayer. We thank you, Lord, for your healing power that flows on the inside of us. We take this body in the name of Jesus and we thank you, Father, that no weapon formed against us would prosper. Father, as we yield to you, we yield to your precious Holy Spirit. We thank you, Father, for another great week. Father, as we begin another week, as we start off our Monday, thank you, Father, for the blessing of the Lord on our seeds. Father, I thank you, Lord, that the seeds from the past will come to harvest at last. We speak to the seeds in the name of Jesus and we thank you, Lord, that they're springing forth bountifully in the mighty name of Jesus. Father, we lack no good thing. You are our provider. You're our Jehovah Jireh. And we believe, Father, that this week will be a blessed week. Father, that when we put our hands to the plow and we're working, it will be sweatless victories. Father, I thank you for the sweatless victories this week. Father, for the people that are believing you for creative miracles in their lives—not just in their bodies, but creative miracles in their finances. Father, I thank you, Lord, that it will come out even when it seems like there's no hope. You're the God of hope. We believe, Father, that this week will be exceedingly abundantly above all that they dare ask or think in their marriages, in their finances, in their health, in their mental state, in their emotions—in everything they put their hands to, they will prosper. I thank you, Father, that this will be a week of abundance to the full, to the overflow. We call it in right now. Angels of the Lord, go ministering spirits and cause it to come forth in the name of Jesus. We thank you, Lord, that we lack no good thing and we will finish that which you've set us out to do. We'll do it with integrity and we'll do it with excellence in the mighty name of Jesus. Everybody say, "For creative ideas." For he gives you the power to get wealth to establish his covenant with you. He anoints your hands to bring it in. Do you believe that tonight? He'll anoint your hands. Whatever you put your hands to will prosper. I believe it. Say, "I believe it. I receive it." Creative ideas in the midnight hour—he'll speak to you when you're sleeping at night and he'll say, "I'm going to give you an idea, an invention, an investment." He is able to do it. So I thank you, Lord, that we yield to that anointing. We yield to the anointing of the sower. We are sowers, but we yield to the anointing of the reaper. We're reapers. We call those things that be not as though they were. We believe we receive it in the mighty name of Jesus. Father, we take this body and we believe that you're the God of the breakthrough. You bring that breakthrough to us right now in the name of Jesus, exceedingly abundantly above all that we dare ask or think. We take this body in Jesus' name. Lord, we thank you for the blood. We make much of the blood and the blood makes much of us. It never loses its power. We plead the blood of Jesus over us tonight. I thank you that we are uninterrupted and unhindered by any satanic or demonic force. We apply the blood of Jesus over us and we yield to the anointing of the prophetic. We yield to the anointing of the watcher. We yield to that which you've called us to do. We do it with boldness and accuracy. We're not flaky. I thank you, Lord, that we're led by the Spirit of God. For we are the sons and daughters of God. For those that are led by the Spirit of God are the sons and daughters of God. We are led by you. We're filled with and controlled by the Holy Ghost. We're not led by flakiness; we're led by you, Holy Spirit. We yield to you. I thank you, Lord, that when we do that, there's much fruit—overflow in the fruit, in the name of Jesus. We take the blood right now. God's opening doors that no man can shut in your life this week. Expect the unexpected. The impossible is what I'm trying to say. Expect what people would say is impossible; that's going to come to be possible in your life today. Expect it. This is a week of breakthrough. Say it. You've got to speak to your mountain. You've got to say it out of your mouth. I believe I have mountain-dissolving faith in my mouth and I'm going to decree a thing. I'm going to say to my mountain, "Be removed in the name of Jesus." I'm not going to have doubt or lack. I'm going to have overflow in the name of Jesus in my house. I speak to the mountain of lack. I speak to the mountain of "not enough" and barely getting by. I speak to it in the name of Jesus and I tell it to be cast into the sea. I'm not doubting in my heart. I'm going to have whatsoever things I say. I believe it. Either you believe it or you don't. You're a believing believer and you're an overcomer by the blood of the Lamb and by the word of our testimony. Jesus—his testimony is, "I give you abundant life to the extreme, until it overflows." I'm telling you tonight, it's time for you to believe for the big. I saw it today. I was driving around and had to go to the grocery store and the Lord spoke to me and said, "It's time to believe me for more. But when you do, you've got to sow big to reap big." I want you to sow bigger seeds. I want you to believe me for more. In my heavenly account, I go and add it up. What's a hundredfold of that seed that I just sowed? Okay, so it's multiplication time. So I go in there, add it up on my calculator. Diana goes, "Man, you've got that down pat." Yes, because God is a God of serious business. As he is, so are we in this world. We have it inside of us to be just like him. Be imitators of God as dear children imitate their father. I'm going to imitate him. He is a God that has more than enough. He has the cattle on a thousand hills. So I'm going to imitate what he has. He's not a God of lack. A lot of you are going to hate heaven if you don't like a blessing because there are streets of gold, blessings, and mansions. He didn't say a trailer house. There's nothing wrong with a trailer house, but you've got to believe God for bigger. And that's what he said: "Sow big to reap big." He started speaking to me about it today when I was driving. He said, "You've got to get poverty thinking out of your thoughts because all you've thought is janitor your whole life, minimum wage. You've got to think bigger, Brandon. Think bigger. I'm going to give you—I'm going to open the fountains of the deep, the secret things, if you believe me for it: good measure, pressed down, shaken together, and running over." What was amazing about Abraham is no one could say that they gave him the wealth. It was only God. God gave Abraham the abundance. God got all the glory. It's the same thing. We never ask you for anything. The Lord said, "Trust me and give, and I'll give it to you: good measure, pressed down, shaken together, running over. I'll do it. You don't have to worry about people." "Just do what I tell you to do and I'll bring it to you." And I said, "I trust you, Father." As a janitor, being that way for over 17 years, working for a mega ministry in Fort Worth, working for a church, cleaning bathrooms, making a minimum wage, barely making it, living on nothing. And God turned around and says, "I want you to do eBay." And he started doing eBay and then started Poshmark and then started Mercari and started doing other platforms. And God said, "I'm going to show you how to do this." Then you can flip a car. I'll teach you how to flip a car and you buy a car for nothing and fix it up and clean it up and go put it on the street corner and God will help you sell it. Don't limit God. And that's the way it was with us all the time. Find things and flip them. The wealth of the sinner is laid up for the righteous. And people don't want to hear that, but it's the truth. Well, you can't make nothing doing that. Yes, you can. You're just ignorant. Misspelled items. Let me tell you another one. People that have learning disabilities—and you're not trying to be mean—but Diana asked me, "How do you spell this, Brandon?" And she used the things that I overcome because I don't spell nothing very well. And she'd go, "How do you spell this, Brandon? How do you spell Louis Vuitton?" I said, "This is how I spell it." She goes, "Okay." And they grin because they know it's not spelled right. But if you could put it in the search engine that way, you'll find it because somebody else has spelled it the same way and they're trying to sell it that way. I'm just trying to tell you something.
